backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Nellore city guide backend with mutable stores for overview, demographics, attractions, cuisine, facts, and restaurants, exposing add/get query and update methods for each.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that CuisineSection.tsx was updated to render generated images for Chepala Pulusu, Prawns Biriyani, and Natu Kodi Kura with emoji fallback and South Indian theme styling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose, styling approach, and data dependencies.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Nellore React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the Vite/TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that seeds backend data on first load and composes all page sections (Navigation, Hero, About, Attractions, Cuisine, Restaurants, Demographics, Facts, Footer) in order.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Displays the Nellore city overview fetched from the backend in a styled card with a decorative accent bar, icon header, and quick-info pills for key city attributes.
frontend/src/components/AttractionsSecti: Renders a responsive grid of attraction cards with full-width image banners loaded from generated assets via keyword-based name matching, falling back to emoji banners on error.
frontend/src/components/CuisineSection.t: Renders a grid of cuisine cards with full-width image banners, spice-level badges, and emoji fallbacks; includes image mappings for eleven dishes including Chepala Pulusu, Prawns Biriyani, and Natu Kodi Kura.
frontend/src/components/DemographicsSect: Renders a demographics section with a static stats grid and a dynamic text overview fetched via `useDemographics`, showing skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/components/FactsSection.tsx: Displays a grid of fun facts about Nellore fetched via `useFacts`, with color-coded cards and skeleton placeholders during loading.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with branding, smooth-scroll navigation links, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, city title, stats row, a CTA button that scrolls to the About section, and a small image gallery.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll links, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/RestaurantsSecti: Displays a grid of restaurant cards fetched via `useRestaurants`, each showing name, cuisine, price range, description, and area, with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/SectionHeader.ts: Reusable centered section header component with a title, optional subtitle, and a colored decorative divider supporting terracotta, gold, or teal accents.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (restaurants, city info), and contains hardcoded seed data constants for Nellore city overview, demographics, attractions, and cuisine.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines CSS custom properties for a South Indian-themed color palette (terracotta, gold, teal) with light and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Lato), oklch-based color tokens (terracotta, gold, teal, sidebar), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state including version, summary, existing features, requirements, and image asset specifications for a Nellore city informational app built on the Internet Computer.
